latest.notes:
- fix(openclaw): suppress Doctor warning box / state-migration banner on stdout via `--log-level silent --no-color`; fixes broken JSON parse in /api/openclaw/models and other endpoints under openclaw 2026.6.1+ (LLM 管理 model dropdown was empty)
- fix(release): bundle morning-report default templates under `assets/` instead of `data/` so install.sh's data symlink does not delete them (was causing ENOENT for `_format.md` on fresh release installs)
- test(e2e): make setup-imunifyav.spec idempotent — purge any prior install before running the full lifecycle
- known issue: under openclaw 2026.6.1, cron jobs with `sessionTarget=isolated` may fall back to `qwen-oauth/coder-model` (the default-tagged model) instead of `agents.defaults.model.primary`; if that provider has no auth, the run errors with `FailoverError: Unknown model`. Workaround: configure auth for the default-tagged provider, or wait for the upstream openclaw fix.
